High-Z line.
Sensor will pull up once it ready. Read it and left line in High-Z.
Sensor wil pull UP again in about 9ms.

Example of readings:
```
11011111111111111010
11011111111111111010
11011111111111111010
11011111111111111010
11011111111111111010
11011111111111111000
11011111111111111000
11011111111111111010
11011111111111111010
11011111111111111010

11011111111111111110
```
